## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `python tools/validate.py` with no errors
- [ ] Added UUIDs to all new entries
- [ ] Updated `MANIFEST.json` version if adding a new taxonomy
- [ ] No STRIKE or SecurityScorecard attribution in added content
- [ ] JSON files use 2-space indentation and alphabetical key order
- [ ] Machine-readable values use lowercase with hyphens
- [ ] Human-readable `expanded` fields use title case
